headline: 'Attractively Valued': Analyst Bets Big On Netflix's Multi-Year Growth Run
summary: Guggenheim maintains a Buy rating on Netflix (NFLX) despite a guidance miss, highlighting strong long-term growth and compelling valuation.

headline: Netflix: Here's Why The Market Overreacted, And Why I Think They're Wrong (Rating Downgrade)
summary: Netflix delivered strong Q1 results, but shares sold off due to decelerating growth expectations. Read why NFLX stock is downgraded from Strong Buy to Buy.
